## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and NoBoring Design to discuss content strategy, performance, and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 new articles going live this week; content standardization improving](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Significant increase in impressions (17K+ week-over-week)](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [New performance dashboard created for better tracking and visualization](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Team expanding: Martha joining as additional content editor](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Opportunities identified for improved sales attribution and content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates

  - [10 new articles going live this week](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Standardizing formatting: FAQs, key takeaways, "in brief" sections](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Incorporating search-friendly question-based topics](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Manual indexing requests being submitted to improve Google visibility](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Content pipeline expanding through competitor keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Clicks slightly up week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Impressions increased by 17K+](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [New performance dashboard created:](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Shows week-by-week progress](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Breaks down performance by content category](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [Allows sorting by clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [Displays search queries driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WyGRn5cDtBSZKDf_HrWhkNNXPT6x4syM?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### Team Updates
